title: Pro API Modules Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Pro API external service modules (modules_config.json). The top-level keys are URL path prefixes (e.g. 'services') and each nested key is a module name.

^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$.description: URL path prefix group. Each key is a module name routed under this prefix (e.g. /<prefix>/<module_name>/...).

description.description: Human-readable description of the module, exposed via GET /api/json/endpoints.

service_url.description: Base URL of the external service that matched requests are forwarded to.

swagger_url.description: URL of the service's OpenAPI 2.0 / 3.x spec (JSON or YAML) used to build the endpoint trie.

api_key.description: How the service API key is attached to forwarded requests. Omit or set to null to forward without an API key.

location.description: Where the API key is attached on forwarded requests.

param_name.description: Name of the header or query parameter used for the API key (e.g. 'x-api-key').

env_var.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the API key value.

root.description: If true, the module is also registered at the root of the endpoint trie and reachable as /<module_name>/... (in addition to /<prefix>/<module_name>/...).

allowed_paths.description: Regex patterns applied to the full spec path; only operations matching at least one pattern are exposed.
